reply: Hello! I'm the TourX travel assistant. Ask me about itineraries, offline maps, safety, or anything else about your trip.
You can generate a personalised itinerary from the AI Travel Planner tab — just enter your destination, trip length, budget, and interests.
Open Offline Maps and download the region before you travel. Downloaded regions stay available even without a signal.
If you're in danger, use the Emergency SOS button on the Safety tab — it shares your live location with your registered emergency contacts instantly.
Check the Weather tab for a live forecast for your current itinerary destination.
Head to Recommendations > Food to see restaurants ranked by your cuisine preferences and proximity.
Recommendations > Hotels lists stays filtered by your budget and preferred amenities.
Smart Crowd Prediction shows a live-estimated crowd level for each attraction so you can plan around busy times.
Your Eco Travel Score is calculated from your transport choices and activities — opt for trains and walking tours to raise it.
Use the AI Translator to convert phrases between English and the local language in real time, text or speech.
Public Transport Assistant has routes, schedules, and fares for buses, trains, and metro services between major destinations.
Log your spending in the Expense Tracker to compare it against your planned trip budget in real time.
You're welcome! Have a wonderful trip. Ping me any time you need help.
